tests.name: pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/csharpIndex/indexTree indexes file-scoped and block-scoped namespaces into qualified names
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/csharpIndex/indexTree indexes top-level types without a namespace qualifier
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/csharpIndex/indexTree inherits the current namespace when a namespace node has no readable name
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/csharpIndex/indexTree does not treat enclosing type declarations as namespace scopes for nested types
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/csharpIndex/indexTree ignores non-type nodes and type declarations without a readable name
